summary: Iteration 42: Bug Fix VERIFIED - Table Alcohol ID Verification Flow Working. The handleIdVerified function refactoring is successful. (1) ID verification modal appears when adding alcohol item to unverified table session, (2) After confirming checkbox and clicking 'Confirm & Add Item', item is successfully added to the order, (3) Session shows 'ID verified' badge, (4) TAP/Bar does NOT have ID verification modal - correct behavior, (5) Manager financial values are positive.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: After confirming ID verification in the Table module for an alcoholic item, the item was not being added
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: handleIdVerified was losing reference to sessionId and pendingAlcoholItem due to async state updates
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: handleIdVerified refactored to capture sessionId and itemToAdd in local variables BEFORE any async operations, then performs verify-id → close modal → add item → refresh sequentially

evidence.backend_test: 6/6 tests passed - E2E flow works: open table → verify-id → add alcohol → item appears in session
evidence.frontend_test: Playwright confirms: (1) ID modal appears, (2) checkbox works, (3) confirm adds item, (4) no error toast, (5) IPA Draft shows in order at $9.00, (6) ID verified badge appears

steps: Open table with guest 'ID Verify Test Guest'
ID Verification modal appears with checkbox
Check checkbox 'I have verified this guest's ID (21+)'
Item added successfully - order shows IPA Draft x1 $9.00
ID verified badge appears next to server name
POST /api/tap/session/{id}/add with IPA Draft → line_item_id returned
GET /api/tap/session/{id} → IPA Draft in items array

TAP_Bar_No_ID_Verification.description: TAP/Bar can add alcohol items without ID verification modal - correct business logic
TAP_Bar_No_ID_Verification.evidence: Clicking IPA Draft in TAP does not show id-verification-modal

seed_data_creation: Created 'ID Verify Test Guest' session on Table #6 with IPA Draft item
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified for Table alcohol ID verification flow. Key code: handleIdVerified at TablePage.js line 200 captures sessionId and itemToAdd before async ops. ID verification modal appears when adding alcohol item to unverified table session. Modal has data-testids: id-verification-modal, id-verify-checkbox, id-verify-confirm-btn. TAP/Bar does NOT have ID verification - by design. Alcohol items in catalog have is_alcohol=true flag.
